codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: Import now has Scan QR wiring, QrScanner uses getUserMedia(environment) + jsQR decoding with expected-prefix validation, denied/revoked-camera states are surfaced, invalid payloads stay inline while scanning continues, and close/unmount paths stop all tracks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-screen-worker procedure requires a Playwright demo-gallery run, but this worker handoff reports only typecheck + vitest while still declaring followedProcedure=true. Procedure/enforcement expectations may be out of sync with current validator-owned e2e workflow.

summary: Pass: no blocking or non-blocking code defects found in the reviewed feature diff; behavior and tests align with m6-camera-qr-scan expectations. One shared-state observation was recorded about skill procedure alignment.
